历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 8150 → 10329 → 20366 → 13751 → 12723, showing significant fluctuations; in 2023 due to, in 2024 it recovered to 13751, and in 2025 it further rebounded to 12723, with a clear upward trend for two consecutive years, with a baseline of about 12723 in 2025; the enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province was 17 in 2021, 19 each from 2022 to 2024, 20 in 2025, and 20 in 2026, with the 2026 plan unchanged from 2025, no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 79th, with recent rankings stable in the 75–80 range; the university level has a stable attraction for science candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 70th, rated as average; from 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission gaps, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable; Psychology A+ (top in the country, science enrollment in Applied Psychology), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, Physical Education A-; Chemistry (Teacher Training) corresponds to the chemistry discipline, although not separately rated as A-class, the teacher training chemistry major has disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity rating for Computer Science is recommended, significantly cooling from 2023 (82.69) but still slightly hot; Electronics/Communications in 2024 is highly recommended; Electrical Engineering and Automation in 2024 is highly recommended; Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials in 2024 are generally wait-and-see, with some recovery compared to previous years; the total number of candidates in this province in 2026 is about 167,000, with physics category estimated at about 114,395, a decrease of about 2.6% from 2025 (117,407), slightly easing competition; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou (first-tier city), which has strong cross-provincial appeal for candidates from Heilongjiang Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in science rankings for two consecutive years, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province (slightly easing competition), and the stable university level and regional appeal, based on the 2025 baseline of 12723, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12703, with a range of 12203–13203.
